control: AR-vs-AR determinism (two independent bi1 boots, spec OFF)
purpose: rule out boot-to-boot nondeterminism as the source of the spec-vs-AR break
method: raw completion_token_ids diff, two separate vLLM boots, VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=1, num_spec=0, seed=1
boot_b: bi1 run (1781831667) AR ref (clean full run, auto-pruned tmp)
conclusion: AR path is byte-identical across boots -> the 49.91% spec-vs-AR break is a REAL spec divergence, not nondeterminism
ref_fingerprint_file: control_ar_bi1_ref_fingerprint.json (id -> completion_token_sha256 for boot_a; reproduce by re-serving --pin bi1 spec-off and matching shas)
